title: Phantom drone
description: Changes the phantom model to a drone
body:
## Optifine or EMF required
The resource pack uses a custom model and animations.
- **EMF https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features**
- **ETF https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures**
- **Optifine https://optifine.net/downloads**
## Description
Funny resource pack that changes the aggressive phantom to a cute delivery drone. Many may think that this drone is not very friendly, but the main thing is not to panic, it attacks when it feels fear.
## Preview
![Drone in its natural habitat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1923c4298a85270e879bd28f165d54e2404ef9bd_0.webp)
